path.style: fill-rule: nonzero; fill: #000000; stroke-width: 0.75; stroke: none;
fill-rule: nonzero; fill: #000000; stroke-width: 0.75; stroke: none;
fill-rule: nonzero; fill: #000000; stroke-width: 0.75; stroke: none;

polygon.style: stroke-width: 0.78; stroke: none; stroke-linecap: butt; stroke-linejoin: miter; stroke-miterlimit: 4.00; fill: none;

polyline.style: stroke-width: 0.78; stroke-linecap: butt; stroke-linejoin: miter; stroke-miterlimit: 4.00;
